# Generated by Copilot under FIS AI Policy
# ! Evalutation ONLY ! Developed using the Github Copilot Feature Testing org - NOT FOR PRODUCTION WORK
# ============================================================================
# T31 - 100-Pair Multi-Symbol Load (200 Orders)
# ============================================================================
# Validates: OMS handles order flow across multiple symbols.
#            200 orders (100 buy-sell pairs) distributed across 7 symbols
#            with randomized prices and quantities.
# Measures: Multi-symbol throughput
# ============================================================================

Reset
SenderCompId:{{SENDER_COMP_ID}}
TargetCompId:{{TARGET_COMP_ID}}
Connect:{{OMS_HOST}}:{{OMS_PORT}}

# Expect Logon acknowledgment
Wait:35=A

Message:T31 START $TIMESTAMP

# Execute the multi-symbol helper 100 times
# Each iteration sends 1 buy + 1 sell = 2 orders, so 100 x 2 = 200 orders
Execute:helpers\T31_multi_symbol_pair.txt:100

Message:T31 END $TIMESTAMP

Message:T31 PASSED - 200 orders across 7 symbols processed

# Verify: at least 100 execution reports received (mix of acks and fills)
VerifyCount:35=8:>=100
# Verify: at least 1 fill received (random symbols may not always match)
VerifyCount:35=8|150=F:>=1

Save:results\T31_result.txt
Disconnect
